# Pull request

## What changed

Describe the user-visible problem and the behavior after this change.

## Why this approach

Explain why this is the smallest correct solution and note important alternatives.

## Validation

List the exact commands and manual checks you ran.

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Relevant backend, SPA, native, or fitness tests pass
- [ ] Regression coverage was added where behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation was updated where commands or expectations changed

## Boundaries and compatibility

- [ ] Project isolation and Cortex API boundaries remain intact
- [ ] Supported operating systems, harnesses, and providers were considered
- [ ] No customer payload, generated runtime state, private path, or chat history
  is included
- [ ] No credential, token, private key, or sensitive log is included

## License and dependencies

- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution under `AGPL-3.0-only`
- [ ] New dependencies and copied assets are identified with compatible licenses
- [ ] Existing third-party notices are preserved

## Release impact

- [ ] No release or migration impact
- [ ] Release, migration, upgrade, or rollback notes are included
